c74object.name: ambitap.encode~
c74object.digest: Encode a mono source to higher-order ambisonics (AmbiX: ACN/SN3D)
c74object.description: Encode a mono source to higher-order ambisonics (AmbiX: ACN/SN3D). Order is a creation argument; the output is one multichannel signal of (order+1)^2 channels.

attribute.name: elevation
attribute.description: Source elevation in radians. 0 = horizon, pi/2 = zenith.

attribute.name: azimuth
attribute.description: Source azimuth in radians. 0 = front, pi/2 = left, pi = behind.
